steps.title: Enter the two profit points
steps.content: The problem gives two points on the linear function: $(8,220)$ and $(10,320)$. Enter those points as two lists in Desmos.

steps.title: Run a linear regression
steps.content: Type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=50$ and $b=-180$, so the profit function is $f(x)=50x-180$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice D matches $f(x)=50x-180$. It also checks with both given values: $f(8)=220$ and $f(10)=320$, so choice D is correct.
